name: LILYGO T-Keyboard-S3-Pro Library
description: Driver library for LILYGO T-Keyboard-S3-Pro (up to five GC9107 128x128 IPS panels + five keys + 14 WS2812C RGB LEDs + optional rotary encoder). An STM32G030 co-processor multiplexes the panels' chip-select, reads the keys and drives the LEDs over I2C; the panels use LovyanGFX. Supports magnetically chained boards.
